classifications.label: GHOST
classifications.note: The session issue path audits the event before returning.

new_traps.hypothesis: The issued token is returned without being bound to a revocation record.
new_traps.label: NEW
new_traps.note: The token is created directly from the user id.
new_traps.remediation: Persist revocation metadata when issuing the token.

spec_mutations: Specify whether session tokens need revocation metadata at issuance time.
decision_rationale: The new finding has a concrete remediation.
